title: Add AI Image Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI Image Generator](https://unique-chebakia-44dbdc.netlify.app/) to image
- Generate images with AI Image Generator.

Fixes #9991

gist.headline: New bloom: AI Image Generator
gist.blurb: A brand new AI Image Generator just sprouted in our community greenhouse. Come see what the hive is building!
gist.summary: Added the community-built AI Image Generator app to the pollinations.ai showcase and greenhouse directories.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and try out this new image generation interface directly from the community apps list.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a new image generator app added to the 'Greenhouse' (community apps). Visuals should include Polly the bee in a greenhouse or garden setting, looking at a glowing canvas or picture frame (representing the image generator) sprouting like a plant.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, watering a glowing picture frame sprouting from a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot inside a digital greenhouse. Soft pastel gradient background with warm sunlight filtering through the glass. Chunky retro sprites, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, emotionally warm.
